description: A landscape depicting flooded fields on a misty morning. Water covers the low-lying terrain, reflecting the pale sky. Bare trees and hedgerows stand in the middle distance, with buildings partially visible beyond. A fence line runs through the foreground, partially submerged. The sky is hazy blue-white, and the overall palette is muted with soft greens, browns, and blues.

_meta.title: View of Bazincourt, Flood, Morning Effect
